HIV Screening Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/hiv-screening-test/ 
HIV Screening Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an HIV test? 
An HIV test checks a sample of your blood, saliva (spit), or urine (pee) to see whether you are infected with HIV (human immunodeficiency virus). HIV is a virus that destroys certain cells in your immune system . These cells protect your body against diseases from germs , such as bacteria, viruses, and fungi.
